overall.description: A cinematic third-person game engine scene showing a character standing motionless in a misty field at night, overlooking a distant village with a prominent twisted ancient tree. The atmosphere is dark and moody with blue moonlight and fog, briefly interrupted by glowing spectral figures crossing the field.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty field overlooking a village with twisted ancient tree

events.description: glowing white spectral skeletal figures emerge from the left side and run across the field toward the right

agents.ego_description: standing completely motionless in tall grass, facing the distant village and twisted tree while surveying the area

notable_agents.action: group of glowing spectral skeletons running horizontally from left to right across the open field

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree stump with twisted branches silhouetted against the moonlit sky
cluster of traditional wooden village buildings with warm glowing windows
low stone wall or fence running along the right side of the field
leafless twisted trees framing the left side of the view
tall wild grass in the immediate foreground swaying gently in the wind

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless in a field of tall grass at night, facing a distant village illuminated by warm lights against a cold blue moonlit sky. A massive twisted ancient tree dominates the center background. Around the 6-second mark, a group of glowing white spectral skeletal figures emerges from the left and runs across the open field before disappearing into the darkness on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric vista of a moonlit field that is momentarily disrupted by a spectral crossing. It begins with a motionless character standing in tall grass, overlooking a distant village whose warm lights contrast with the cold blue of the night sky. As the camera holds this view, a massive twisted ancient tree dominates the horizon, grounding the moody landscape. The stillness then shifts as a group of glowing white skeletal figures emerges from the left, sprinting across the open field before finally vanishing into the darkness on the right.
